patches_modified.name: Remove ads
patches_modified.description: Simulates the purchase of the 'climbnoads' IAP product by injecting a fake Purchase into the purchase list when the game queries purchases. The game finds 'climbnoads' and treats No Ads as purchased.

patches_modified.name: Login Fix
patches_modified.description: Bypasses verification bans by spoofing signatures and faking GMS checks. REQUIRED: You must manually install microG-RE for Play Integrity to pass.
